steps.t: The orchards of Tûr Morva are to the north-west. Idele has asked you to bring a basket of apples to her from the orchards where several of the Rangers…
A basket of apples near Golodir in the orchard of Tûr Morva is ready for carrying to Idele. Idele has asked you to bring a basket of apples to her fro…
Idele is in Tûr Morva. You have brought a basket of apples to Idele in Tûr Morva and should now speak with her.
There are empty baskets near Idele in Tûr Morva. Idele has asked you to pick up an empty basket and carry it back to Golodir in the orchard north-west…
Golodir is in the orchard of Tûr Morva. You have brought back an empty basket to the orchard and should now speak with Golodir.
Idele is in Tûr Morva, south-east of the orchard. Idele is waiting for some of the apple-wood branches that Golodir collected from the orchard.
Idele is in Tûr Morva. You have brought an armful of apple-wood to Idele, and she wants to speak with you.
The fire Idele is using to smoke the meat for the journey south is by her in the middle of Tûr Morva. Idele has given you some wood to throw on the ne…
Idele is in Tûr Morva. You have helped to smoke some of the meats for the journey of the Falcon south and should speak to the fire-tender, Idele.
